core_mechanism: decomposition of a linear differential (connection) operator and its associated curvature into complementary subspaces selected by an idempotent projection operator, where the operator's action on the projector itself generates the cross-subspace (extrinsic-coupling) terms
brief_reason: The abstract builds all objects from a projection tensor field paired with an arbitrary connection, defining 'extrinsic curvature' and 'cross-projected curvature' tensors and using them to split covariant derivatives, the full curvature tensor, and the Bianchi identities into intra- and inter-subspace parts.
